name: Power Lens Mk. I
description: Tune a focusing lens with insulated wiring to boost energy output.
success_message: You assemble a crisp new Power Lens Mk. I.

name: Ergonomic Grip
description: Mold reinforced weave and scrap into a steadier weapon grip.
success_message: You mold an Ergonomic Grip that feels perfect in the hand.

name: Armor Plating Mk. I
description: Press scrap into a simple ablative armor plate.
success_message: You bolt together Armor Plating Mk. I.

name: Insulated Lining
description: Stitch insulated wiring through weave to soften energy discharge.
success_message: You stitch an Insulated Lining that hums with safety.

name: Functional Cryo-Inductor
description: Repair the damaged Cryo-Inductor so Jed can bring the cold loop online.
success_message: The Cryo-Inductor whirs back to life.

name: Repaired Projector
description: Replace the cracked controller board and restore the school's projector.

name: Repaired Arcade Display
description: Thread nano-filament through the dead pixel lattice.
success_message: You repaired Sam and Ellie's arcade display.

name: Repaired Coffee Grinder
description: Re-seat the grinder teeth and patch the cracked drive housing.

name: Spicy Ramen
description: Use the bench heater and pressure cup to turn field supplies into a sharp combat meal.
success_message: You seal a steaming bowl of Spicy Ramen.

name: Ration Soup
description: Stretch a ration pack into a warmer, cleaner recovery meal.
success_message: You turn the ration pack into a restorative soup.

name: Glowfish Broth
description: Stabilize glow-water fish into a mineral broth that steadies the hands.
success_message: You brew a bowl of Glowfish Broth.
